title: Ye Gamol Chattels Reborn
body:
This mod introduces a diverse collection of decorative objects designed to enhance both aesthetics and immersion in your game world. Every feature has been carefully considered to ensure a seamless and visually appealing experience. Whether you're looking to add grandeur to your builds or subtle details that bring your surroundings to life, this mod offers a variety of unique decorative elements.

You’ll find items such as:

Statues – Majestic sculptures to adorn your world.
Banners & Flags – Perfect for adding heraldic touches to castles, towns, and camps.
Gongs – Functional and decorative, ideal for temples or ceremonial spaces.
Weapon Racks & Item Shelves – Showcase your prized weapons, tools, and collectibles.
Clocks – Both stylish and practical, adding a touch of realism to interiors.
Snow Globes – Beautiful ornamental pieces for a cozy, wintry atmosphere.
More features and items, including additional statues, will be introduced in future updates. New crafting recipes will also be added over time, so stay tuned!

Credits:
Special thanks to Ivorius for contributions to this project.

Requirements:
This mod requires GeckoLib to function properly. If you experience issues with animations, try disabling entity shadows in shaders to resolve the problem.
